name: Confluent Cloud
description: Monitor Confluent Cloud (managed Apache Kafka) for user access, RBAC role bindings, infrastructure inventory, and encryption settings

config.setupInstructions: Go to confluent.cloud, open the sidebar menu and click API keys (or go directly to confluent.cloud/settings/api-keys). Click Add API key, select My account or a Service account, choose Cloud resource management as the scope, then copy the API Key and Secret. The key needs OrganizationAdmin role to access users, environments, and clusters.

credentialFields.label: Cloud API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Confluent Cloud API Key ID

credentialFields.label: Cloud API Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The API Secret shown once at key creation

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users and service accounts in the Confluent Cloud organization to verify access is appropriate

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews RBAC role bindings across the Confluent Cloud organization to ensure least-privilege access

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all environments and Kafka clusters in the Confluent Cloud organization for infrastructure tracking

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies encryption configuration for Confluent Cloud by checking for BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) customer-managed encryption keys
